scope_boundary: No page redesign, no SEO engine creation, no mass content rewrite, no PHI/PMS/Dentally/booking workflow changes, no deployment, and no launch certification claim.

remaining_launch_blockers: Apply approved_for_* runtime flag mutations in a bounded implementation packet or update QA contract to consume this approval ledger.
Run final launch hardening after approval flags and schema consumption are aligned with CI evidence.
Do not claim launch certification until final hardening evidence passes.
